arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Ayden Heaven has been given full Man United debut vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Ayden Heaven has been handed a first start of his senior career in Manchester United's Europa League clash with Real Sociedad this evening.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes insists it's the RIGHT time for Man United to leave Old Trafford - but explains why he has doubts about their new £2bn super stadium
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe announced earlier this week that United plan to build a new £2bn stadium, while moving on from the ground they have called home since 1910.

arts.ttl: Who is Ayden Heaven? Man United teenager starts in Europa League vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Ayden Heaven has made a fast start to life at Man United after defecting from Arsenal

arts.ttl: How Man United can be one of seven Premier League teams that qualify for Champions League
arts.sum: There is a very real possibility that England could be represented in the Champions League next season by seven teams thanks to UEFA's rules

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Real Sociedad: Europa League last-16, second leg – live
arts.sum: Updates from a finely-poised last-16 tie (agg 1-1, 8pm KO) Get in touch! Email Daniel | Live scores As for Sociedad, the main man is back. Zubimendi is a lovely footballer, one of few able to control a game. I’d expect his team to have much better-quality possession, and Oyarzabal to have much better service; if United have any sense, their two 10s will get around him like Sam Allardyce’s Bolton did to Claude Makélélé. Otherwise, having Dorgu back should make a difference. He gives the team balance, also bringing the pace and strength it so severely lacks, and his intelligence on and off the ball might be important tonight – already, he looks to be building an understanding with Bruno Fernandes. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Barcelona and Real Madrid derail Man Utd transfer hopes for ex-Man City star
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid could emerge as frontrunners to sign Jeremie Frimpong this summer after reports that the Bayer Leverkusen defender could be the subject of a tug-of-war by the Spanish giants. Real are expecting to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold on a free transfer as their ideal right-back choice but they could turn to Frimpong if the England international renews his contract with Liverpool, with his current deal set to expire this summer.

arts.ttl: Team News: Amorim makes major call as Man United XI for Real Sociedad battle is confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim names Ayden Heaven in his starting side for Thursday's Europa League last-16 second leg with Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains relationship with Man United officials and gives verdict on the Red Devils' new £2bn stadium plans
arts.sum: Amorim has given his verdict on the new 100,000 seater, £2billion stadium United are keen to build and explained how he feels he has the support of Sir Jim Ratcliffe and Co.

arts.ttl: I play with David de Gea - it's absurd Manchester United let him go
arts.sum: David de Gea left Man United in July 2023 after 12 years at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe left with dilemma over Man Utd star Wayne Rooney wants to stay
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Wayne Rooney says Kobbie Mainoo is one of the few players at the club he would keep, however, the midfielder's long-term future is uncertain
